title: JavaScript Mastery: ES6+ and Async Patterns
summary: Advance JavaScript skills focusing on modern syntax and asynchronous programming fundamental to frontend development.
targetSkill: Strong proficiency in JavaScript + async programming
personalizationNote: Build on existing JavaScript knowledge with ES6+ syntax refresh and async coding best practices relevant to frontend APIs and UI updates.
learningObjectives: Understand ES6+ features (let, const, arrow functions)
knowledgeChecks: What keyword pauses execution inside an async function?
How do you catch errors in promise chains?
narrationScript:
Scene 1: Modern JavaScript Features
Use 'let' and 'const' instead of 'var' for clearer scoping. Arrow functions provide concise syntax, and destructuring unpacks objects cleanly.

Scene 2: Promises and Async/Await
Promises represent future values. Async/await lets us write async code that looks synchronous, making it easier to read and maintain.

Scene 3: Debugging Async JavaScript
Set breakpoints in async functions to inspect state. Console log promises and use network panels to troubleshoot API calls effectively.

slides.title: Modern JavaScript Features
slides.speakerNotes: Modern syntax enhances code clarity and reduces errors. We'll refresh essentials you'll use every day in React and scripts.
slides.narration: Use 'let' and 'const' instead of 'var' for clearer scoping. Arrow functions provide concise syntax, and destructuring unpacks objects cleanly.
slides.visualCue: Code snippets before and after ES6 refactoring.

slides.title: Promises and Async/Await
slides.speakerNotes: Async JavaScript underpins data fetching and responsive UIs. We'll clarify how promises and async/await simplify asynchronous flows.
slides.narration: Promises represent future values. Async/await lets us write async code that looks synchronous, making it easier to read and maintain.
slides.visualCue: Diagram of promise lifecycle and async/await flow.

slides.title: Debugging Async JavaScript
bullets: Logging and breakpoints in async code
slides.speakerNotes: Async bugs can be tricky. We'll cover debugging patterns and tooling to resolve issues quickly in frontend apps.
slides.narration: Set breakpoints in async functions to inspect state. Console log promises and use network panels to troubleshoot API calls effectively.
slides.visualCue: Devtools screenshot demonstrating async breakpoint usage.
